description.en: Once thought extinct, this 「Oriental Gem」 was rediscovered in China in 1981.
description.zh: 曾被认为已经灭绝，这种「东方宝石」于 1981 年在中国被重新发现。

anatomy.en: It has white plumage with a salmon-pink glow under its wings and a long, curved black bill.
anatomy.zh: 它拥有白色的羽毛，翅膀下方透着朱红色，长着黑色的长而弯曲的喙。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They nest in tall trees and forage in rice paddies and wetlands for small fish, frogs, and crabs.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们在高大的树上筑巢，在稻田和湿地中觅食小鱼、青蛙和螃蟹。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Found mainly in the Qinling Mountains of Shaanxi Province, where conservation efforts have saved them.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 主要发现于陕西秦岭地区，保护工作成功地拯救了这一物种。

habitat.text_en: Wetlands and forests of Qinling Mountains
